description_long: This is a mid-century modern style chest of drawers constructed from a rich, dark wood with a smooth, matte finish. The front features three horizontal drawers on the right and a single vertical cabinet door on the left, all with subtle, integrated handles that blend seamlessly into the design. The chest stands on four slightly splayed, tapered wooden legs, giving it a light and elevated appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible throughout, emphasizing its natural material. There are no visible decorative embellishments, locks, or branding on the exterior. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark wood chest of drawers with three drawers, a cabinet door, and tapered legs in a minimalist, mid-century modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the right, a single cabinet door on the left, and all four legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden side panel and two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back and both rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden panel and two visible legs.
